command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Read lines 450-475 of config.yaml to see full tools section ==="
sed -n '450,475p' /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml

echo ""
echo "=== How does Hermes deny tools? Search the source for deny/blacklist ==="
grep -rn "deny\|blacklist\|blocked_tools\|disabled_tools\|disallow" /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/gateway/ 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "config|tool|deny" | grep -v ".pyc" | head -15

echo ""
echo "=== What does the send_message tool do? Find its definition ==="
grep -rn "def send_message\|name.*send_message\|tool.*send_message" /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v ".pyc" | head -10

echo ""
echo "=== Check the Hermes TOOL schema - how to deny individual tools ==="
grep -rn "deny\|tool.*deny\|disabled" /home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/hermes_cli/config.py 2>/dev/null | head -15
REMOTE
